reason: The diff clearly implements the stated intent of merging main into next by adding bug fixes and features from main, including: (1) a fix for the "plugins is not iterable" crash in markdown config validation with proper deduplication logic using WeakMap, (2) a fix for SSR dynamic routes returning 404 when prerendered dynamic routes match first by implementing fallthrough logic in matchAll/matchRoute, and (3) comprehensive tests validating both fixes work correctly.
